description: Baseline harness crashed on macOS because GNU-style date +%s%N is unsupported, causing runtime_ms computation failure before METRIC emission.

asi.hypothesis: Baseline script can parse nitrocop summary and emit violation metrics directly.
asi.rollback_reason: Harness timing implementation used non-portable date nanoseconds format on BSD date, triggering unbound variable error.
asi.next_action_hint: Replace timestamp collection with portable millisecond timer and rerun baseline.
asi.error_detail: autoresearch.sh line 38 runtime_ms unbound due %N literal output

description: Baseline run confirms perfect parity (3153 offenses, gap 0) and runtime 46ms, but no primary improvement over current best gap.

asi.hypothesis: Current nitrocop build already matches RuboCop offense count for target repo; any accepted change must preserve gap=0 while improving secondary runtime robustness.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged at optimal value (0 gap), so no keep action under loop rules.
asi.next_action_hint: Run stability checks/repeated baselines to characterize noise, then only keep changes that preserve zero-gap and improve robustness or speed.

name: Nitrocop runtime optimization with RuboCop parity lock (wt-gph-rspec-rip-out)

description: New baseline after metric pivot (runtime primary with parity lock): median nitrocop runtime is 47ms across 7 runs, parity gap remains 0.

asi.hypothesis: Using 7-run median plus hard parity guard gives stable, non-cheating signal for runtime optimization without drifting offense count.
asi.rollback_reason: Baseline establishes starting point; no improvement yet.
asi.next_action_hint: Identify runtime hotspots that affect full-run path (startup/config/cache/formatter) and test small targeted optimizations.

description: Optimized ProgressFormatter map/progress-line construction (pre-sized HashMap and manual String build), but median runtime stayed at 47ms with parity preserved.

asi.hypothesis: Formatter-level allocation reductions in default progress output might lower warm-run runtime without affecting offense counts.
asi.next_action_hint: Target higher-leverage startup path work (arg/config/formatter dispatch) or cache-hit fast-path short-circuiting.
asi.learning: Formatter micro-alloc changes are below noise floor for this workload scale.
